title: ceratostema reginaldii
intro: Ceratostema reginaldii, also known as Reginald's ceratostema, is a flowering plant species native to New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antiviral and antifungal properties. The herbal preparations of Ceratostema reginaldii typically involve the leaves and stems being dried and then used to make teas, infusions, or infuse them in oil for topical applications.
